scripts.copy:standalone-assets: mkdir -p .next/standalone/.next && rm -rf .next/standalone/.next/static && cp -R .next/static .next/standalone/.next/static && if [ -d public ]; then rm -rf .next/standalone/public && cp -R public .next/standalone/public; fi
scripts.start: npm run copy:standalone-assets && HOSTNAME=0.0.0.0 PORT=3016 node .next/standalone/server.js
scripts.test:all: npm run test && npm run test:e2e
